case_title: JASON LEE CORONA VS. THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RON BOWEN FILED BY DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JASON LEE CORONA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS REPRESENTED BY RON BOWEN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK: RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION, MAILED TO JASON LEE CORONA. RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY CORONA, JASON LEE AS TO DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORONA, JASON LEE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00(WAIVED) SERVED AUG-01-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-28-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JASON LEE CORONA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPPED TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CASE TO BE HEARD BY A REGULAR JUDGE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: REGULAR JUDGE
